text: I keep thinking about what I said again and again
What if everything goes wrong tomorrow?
I feel like I made a mistake and I can't stop thinking about it
What if they judge me or think badly of me?
I should complete my assignment today
Let's relax and watch a movie tonight
I will go to gym and stay healthy
I need to focus on my goals
I can't stop thinking about what might happen
Everything is fine, I just need to stay calm
